name: morphapi

metadata.name: morphapi
metadata.summary: A lightweight python package to download neuronal morphologies

documentation:
# morphapi

## Overview
Morphapi is a lightweight python package for downloading neurons
morphological reconstructions from publicly available datasets.

Please see the [documentation](https://brainglobe.info/documentation/morphapi/index.html).

## Seeking help or contributing
We are always happy to help users of our tools, and welcome any contributions. If you would like to get in contact with us for any reason, please see the [contact page of our website](https://brainglobe.info/contact.html).

modules.name: morphapi.paths_manager
documentation: Class to create and store paths to a number of folders uesed to save/load data

methods.name: morphapi.paths_manager.Paths.__init__
documentation:
Parses a YAML file to get data folders paths. Stores paths to a
number of folders used throughtout morphapi.

```
param base_dir

str with path to directory to use to save data.
```

If none the user's base directiry is used.
\:param kwargs: use the name of a folder as key and a path as
argument to specify the path of individual subfolders

Fields contains the types of fields that can be used to
restrict queries

documentation: Returns the list of allowed values for a given query field

methods.name: morphapi.api.neuromorphorg.NeuroMorpOrgAPI.get_neurons_metadata
documentation:
Uses the neuromorpho API to download metadata about neurons.
Criteria can be used to restrict the search to neurons of interest/
<https://neuromorpho.org/apiReference.html>

Neuromorpho.org paginates it's requests so not all neurons metadata
can be returned at once

```
param size

int in range [0, 500]. Number of neurons whose
```

metadata can be returned at the same time
\:param page: int > 0. Page number. The number of pages depends
on size and on how many neurons match the criteria
\:param criteria: use keywords to restrict the query to neurons
that match given criteria.
keywords should be pass as "field=value".
Then only neuron's whose 'field'
attribute has value 'value' will be returned.

documentation: Get a neuron's metadata given it's id number

methods.name: morphapi.api.neuromorphorg.NeuroMorpOrgAPI.download_neurons
documentation:
Downloads neuronal morphological data and saves it to .swc files.
It then returns a list of Neuron instances with
morphological data for each neuron.

```
param neurons

list of neurons metadata (as
```

returned by one of the functions used to fetch metadata)
\:param \_name: used internally to save cached neurons
with a different prefix when the

> class is used to download neurons for other APIs

```
param load_neurons

if set to True, the neurons are loaded into a
 object and returned

param use_neuron_names

if set to True, the filenames
```

use the names of the neurons instead

: of their IDs

modules.name: morphapi.api.mouselight
documentation:
Collections of functions to query https://ml-neuronbrowser.janelia.org/
and get data about either the status of the API, the brain regions or the
neurons available.
Queries are sent by sending POST requests to
https://ml-neuronbrowser.janelia.org/graphql with a string query.

functions.name: morphapi.api.mouselight.mouselight_api_info
documentation: Get the number of cells available in the database
QUERY UTILS                               #

functions.name: morphapi.api.mouselight.mouselight_get_brainregions
documentation:
Get metadata about the brain regions as they are known by
Janelia's Mouse Light.
IDs and Names sometimes differ from Allen's CCF.

functions.name: morphapi.api.mouselight.mouselight_structures_identifiers
documentation:
When the data are downloaded as SWC, each node has a structure
identifier ID to tell if it's soma, axon or dendrite.
This function returns the ID number --> structure table.

functions.name: morphapi.api.mouselight.make_query
documentation:
Constructs the strings used to submit graphql queries to the mouse
light api

```
param filterby

str, soma, axon on dendrite. Search by neurite
```

structure (Default value = None)
\:param filter_regions: list, tuple. list of strings. Acronyms of brain
regions to use for query (Default value = None)
\:param invert: If true the inverse of the query is return (i.e., the
neurons NOT in a brain region) (Default value = False)

functions.name: morphapi.api.mouselight.fetch_atlas
documentation:
Fetch a given atlas.

See here for available atlases:
https://docs.brainglobe.info/brainglobe-atlasapi/introduction#atlases-available

classes.name: morphapi.api.mouselight.MouseLightAPI

methods.name: morphapi.api.mouselight.MouseLightAPI.__init__
documentation:
Handles the download of neurons morphology data from the
Mouse Light project

```
param base_dir

path to directory to use for saving data
```

(default value None)
\:param kwargs: can be used to pass path to individual
data folders. See morphapi/utils /paths_manager.py

methods.name: morphapi.api.mouselight.MouseLightAPI.fetch_neurons_metadata
documentation:
Download neurons metadata and data from the API. The
downloaded metadata can be filtered to keep only
the neurons whose soma is in a list of user-selected brain regions.

```
param filterby

Accepted values: "soma". If it's "soma",
```

neurons are kept only when their soma is in the
list of brain regions defined by filter_regions (Default
value = None)
\:param filter_regions: List of brain regions acronyms.
If filtering neurons, these specify the filter
criteria. (Default value = None)
\:param kwargs:

methods.name: morphapi.api.mouselight.MouseLightAPI.fetch_default_atlas
documentation: Fetch the allen mouse 25nm atlas.

methods.name: morphapi.api.mouselight.MouseLightAPI.filter_neurons_metadata
documentation:
Filter metadata to keep only the neurons whose soma is
in a given list of brain regions.

```
param filterby

Accepted values: "soma". If it's "soma",
```

neurons are kept only when their
soma is in the list of brain regions defined by
filter_regions (Defaultvalue = None)
\:param filter_regions: List of brain regions acronyms.
If filtering neurons, these specify
the filter criteria. (Default value = None)
\:param atlas: A `brainglobe_atlasapi.BrainGlobeAtlas` object.
If not provided, load the default atlas.

methods.name: morphapi.api.mouselight.MouseLightAPI.download_neurons
documentation:
Given a list of neurons metadata from self.fetch_neurons_metadata
this funcition downloads the morphological data.
The data are actually downloaded from neuromorpho.org

```
param neurons_metadata

list with metadata for neurons to download

returns

list of Neuron instances
```
